title: The Judges (Conditions of Service) Act, 2022.

sections.heading: 1. This Act may be cited as the Judges (Conditions of Service) Short title
sections.text:
1. This Act may be cited as the Judges (Conditions of Service) Short title
(Amendment) Act, 2022, and shall be read as one with the Judges Cap. 277
(Conditions of Service) Act, in this Act referred to as the principal
Act.

sections.heading: 2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
sections.text:
2. Section 2 of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
of section 2
(a) deletion of the definition of “emoluments” and the
substitution therefor of the following:
“emoluments” has the meaning assigned to the word
in the Constitution;; and Cap. 1
(b) insertion of the following new definition in the appropriate
place in alphabetical order:
“Emoluments Commission” means the Emoluments
Commission established by the Constitution;. Cap. 1

sections.heading: 3. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 3 and Repeal and
sections.text:
3. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of section 3 and Repeal and
the substitution therefor of the following: replacement
of section 3

sections.heading: 3. There is paid to a Judge emoluments that the Emoluments
sections.text:
3. There is paid to a Judge emoluments that the Emoluments
Emoluments Commission shall, on the recommendation of
the President, determine.

sections.heading: 4. Section 12(2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.text:
4. Section 12(2) of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
insertion of the words “in consultation with the Emoluments of section 12
Commission,” immediately after the word “may,”.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K4.00 each.
86

notes: Ingested in Phase 4 batch 0024. Re-fetch of lost batch 0023.
